PSC.2 REVISED 2007

REPUBLIC OF KENYA 
PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION OF KENYA 
APPLICATION FOR EMPLOYMENT FORM 
Please complete this form in BLocK letters as appropriate and submit to the Secretary, Public Service Commission of Kenya,
P.O.BOX 30095, 00100 NAIROBI, KENYA, or apply On-line via the Commission's Website www.publicservice.go.ke or 
www.psckjobs.go.ke
